construct_validity.expected_direction: harmful trajectories should show higher trigger rate and earlier IRT than benign controls

predictive_validity.direction_note: With IRT indexed by turn, SAT should increase with IRT; TSR and delayed/collapse are expected to decrease as IRT gets later.

irt_simplification_rule: If full IRT validation is noisy or underpowered, retain predictive validity + judge robustness in main text and move others to appendix.

judge_robustness.gate_reason: single_judge_mode cannot satisfy pairwise agreement gate; forced fail-closed.

judge_robustness_note: Judge robustness is required for full IRT interpretation; SAT-shift and spread claims can still stand independently under the simplification rule.
